question: Bitcoin below $80K in 2025?
resolution_criteria:
Yes if the Coinbase BTC-USD 1-minute candle low is ≤ $80,000 any time from market creation (Sep 25, 2025 PT) through Dec 31, 2025 23:59 PT; otherwise No.

Source: Coinbase (BTC-USD). 

Resolution: Dec 31, 2025, 23:59 PT, or earlier upon trigger.
